judge_score.notes: The Scala port captures core SQL parsing and execution logic but has significant gaps: (1) parseInsert is broken with messy control flow and commented-out attempted fixes; (2) RowCtx.colIndex uses Schema static method incorrectly (Schema not passed); (3) ORDER BY only works for single tables, not joins; (4) no transaction support (inTxn exists but unused); (5) StmtHandle lacks prepared statement lifecycle (no finalization resources); (6) missing error handling for malformed queries during execution; (7) the nested-loop join implementation is present but untested. The lexer and basic AST are solid, but executor is incomplete.
